texto: The happily ever after thing. It's great when she marries the prince or whatever and they say that. But they just don't show the part where there's a revolution and they drag her to the guillotine.
explicacao: Citação de Mark D. Diehl sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The happily ever after thing. It's great when she marries the prince or whatever and they say tha…” articula reflexao, fairy-tales, happily em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
